content: MSP outage alert: Microsoft 365 service degradation affecting Exchange Online mailbox access

text.text:
*Current Issue*
Microsoft 365 is reporting an active service degradation affecting Exchange Online mailbox access in some connection methods, with third-party reporting indicating a broader M365 disruption under investigation.

fields.text:
*Status*
Active degradation under investigation / partial outage

*Impact*
Email access and related support volume may spike across Microsoft 365 tenants; expect intermittent mailbox connectivity issues and user-facing Outlook/Exchange disruption.

text.text:
*Response*
• Check Microsoft 365 admin/service health for tenant-specific advisories and pause nonessential mailbox troubleshooting while platform validation is in progress.
• Notify help desk and client-facing teams to expect Outlook/Exchange access complaints, document affected tenants, and steer users to retry rather than making risky local profile changes.
